PokerStars Hand #RC123456789: Hold'em No Limit ($0.50/$1 USD) - 2024/03/01 10:00:00 ET
Table 'Orion V' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: DealerDave ($100 in chips)
Seat 2: FoldingFred ($100 in chips)
Seat 3: QuickFold ($100 in chips)
DealerDave: posts small blind $0.50
FoldingFred: posts big blind $1
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to DealerDave [2c 7h]
QuickFold: folds
DealerDave: folds
FoldingFred collected $0.50 from pot
